issues.objection: Implication for 7.29 gives a PM a concrete diagnostic to apply. The verse does not require buy-in to the metaphysics; it gives a falsifiable engineering predicate. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Heavily metaphysical and forward-pointing. Verse seeds Ch 8's adhyātma/brahman/karma typology. Engineering analog scoped at career-end substrate-articulability. Counter-example: tacit untransmitted gnosis is the failure mode of the analog. PM does not have to absorb the metaphysics; the engineering layer is operationally self-contained and the source pack carries the original at honest scope.

notes: Skeptical-PM test for 7.29: can this verse be applied to a roadmap conversation without first signing onto the Gita's frame? Yes — implication gives a concrete next-action; counter-example tells the PM where the analog does not apply. PASS.
